name: Chavrie & Basil Pizza Bites
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Combine Chavrie, garlic, oregano and pepper in a bowl. Mix well.
3. Cut the French bread into 12 slices. Top each slice with a thin slice of tomato and brush with olive oil.
4. Place 1 teaspoon of cheese mixture on top of each tomato slice.
5. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until the bread is toasted, turning off the heat when done.
6. Remove from oven and top with shredded basil.
